info.name: TIDAL Playlists API
info.description: Create, read, update, delete, and reorder TIDAL playlists. Supports user-owned and editorial playlists.

oauth2.value: collection.read collection.write entitlements.read playback playlists.read playlists.write r_usr recommendations.read search.read search.write user.read w_usr
